_primary_source: PoE2DB Masters of the Atlas page
system_rules: Masters of the Atlas is an endgame Ascendancy-style system (PoE2DB).
Each Master has 12 nodes; 4 can be selected at a time.
Selections can be changed at any time.
All three Masters can be allocated, with a quick select button to change between each Master before running a map.
Unlock rows by performing missions for the Masters.

unlocks.detail: PoE2DB: unlocked by clearing a corruption nexus; inherited guides mention Corrupted Nexus near start and Immured Fury after progression
unlocks.conflict: Exact quest text and row timing need in-game capture.

unlocks.requirement: Visit Hilda's Campsite slightly south-west of Atlas start
unlocks.detail: PoE2DB: speak with Hilda and defeat all 4 Great Beasts

PoE2DB Jado quest page lists the required maps/steps: Jade Isles, Sealed Vault, Sacred Reservoir, and Derelict Mansion, with Speak to Jado steps between completions. PoE2DB Masters page summarizes the unlock as completing an anomaly map near the starting location and defeating 4 Deadly Map Bosses.
unlocks.evidence: Phase 10: resolved C10 against PoE2DB Jados_Spycraft and Atlas_Masters pages.

nodes.name: Trove Seekers
nodes.effect: 100% increased amount of Rare Chests; Strongboxes have 100% increased chance to be Unique

nodes.name: In The Wrong Hands
nodes.effect: Powerful Map Bosses drop an additional unique item

nodes.name: Unexpected Missions
nodes.effect: Corrupted Waystones open a random map area on Basic Maps and Maps with 1 additional random modifier

nodes.name: Unforeseen Threats
nodes.effect: 5% chance on completing Maps for a nearby Anomaly Map to be revealed

nodes.name: Mysterious Gifts
nodes.effect: Rare Strongbox Monsters 5% and Unique Monsters 1% chance to drop a Cryptic Key

nodes.name: Eastern Knowledge
nodes.effect: Verisium Remnants have 10% chance to be rolled an additional time, keeping rarest outcome

nodes.name: Partial Translations
nodes.effect: Randomly gain 0-40% increased effect of Explicit Modifiers on Tablets

nodes.name: Stolen Relics
nodes.effect: Unique Strongboxes may be Legacy of the Order, dropping a Twilight Reliquary Key

nodes.name: Long Days
nodes.effect: 20% more chance of Random Extra Content

nodes.name: Keen Appraisal
nodes.effect: 50% increased Exceptional Items found

nodes.name: Untold Histories
nodes.effect: 35% increased chance to find Lineage Supports; Pinnacle Bosses have 50% increased chance to drop Lineage Supports; Pinnacle Bosses take 35% less Damage

nodes.name: Ancient Activations
nodes.effect: Powerful Map Bosses have 5% chance to add Ancient Modifiers to a nearby Map

nodes.name: Stitch the Flesh
nodes.effect: Your Maps have an additional Revival, up to 6

nodes.name: Refined Formula
nodes.effect: 150% increased Expedition Explosive Radius; 100% increased Explosive Placement Range; Expeditions have only 1 Explosive; Grand Expeditions have only 5 Explosives

nodes.name: Evolutionary Pressure
nodes.effect: Rarity/effectiveness/rare-modifier chance scales per Explicit Modifier on the Map

nodes.name: Improved Calibration
nodes.effect: Waystones have 25% more effect of Prefix or Suffix Modifiers when opening Maps

nodes.name: Disengaged Safeties
nodes.effect: Map Areas are Irradiated

nodes.name: Careful Procurement
nodes.effect: Magic Monster Packs have 35% chance to have an additional Modifier

nodes.name: Volatile Connection
nodes.effect: 15% chance areas are Cleansed or Corrupted

nodes.name: Mechanical Guardians
nodes.effect: Non-Unique Strongboxes guarded by Constructs; Strongboxes have 2% increased item quantity per modifier

nodes.name: Hidden Patterns
nodes.effect: 10% chance when completing a Map to make nearby Maps accessible

nodes.name: Dam the River
nodes.effect: Azmeri Spirits only possess monsters after reaching maximum empowerment

nodes.name: Remnants of Greatness
nodes.effect: Map Bosses 20% chance to guard a Precursor Terraformer to change nearby map biome

nodes.name: Head of the Snake
nodes.effect: Pinnacle Bosses 25% chance to drop additional Unique; Powerful Map Bosses 5% chance to reveal nearby Citadel; Pinnacle Bosses have a single Revive

nodes.name: Breeding Season
nodes.effect: 15% increased Rare Monsters; Rare Monsters have 25% increased chance of Monster Modifiers

nodes.name: Mighty Prey
nodes.effect: 25% chance to upgrade Map Bosses to Powerful Map Bosses

nodes.name: Scarred Lands
nodes.effect: 15% increased Runic Monster Markers; 20% increased Rare Expedition Monsters

nodes.name: Dangerous Game
nodes.effect: Rogue Exiles have 20% chance to flee to adjacent Map and upgrade equipment

nodes.name: Soul Eaters
nodes.effect: Map Bosses gain effectiveness per 100 Power of monsters slain

nodes.name: Will of the Draiocht
nodes.effect: Azmeri Spirits cannot possess Rare Monsters

nodes.name: Call of the Spirits
nodes.effect: Possessed Unique Monsters release Spirits on death

nodes.name: Ancient Inscriptions
nodes.effect: 8% increased effect of Explicit Modifiers on Tablets for each type of Tablet affecting Map area

nodes.name: Lethal Adaptation
nodes.effect: 40% increased Effectiveness of Unique Monsters with Modifiers

nodes.name: Patient Battue
nodes.effect: 25% chance 1 Rare Monster is replaced by a random Map Boss; 5% chance 3 additional Rare Monsters are replaced by random Map Bosses

nodes.name: Gutting and Skinning
nodes.effect: Pinnacle Bosses may be scavenged for 5% chance at additional Unique; Unique monsters 1% chance to be scavenged for Unique

nodes.name: Claimed Territories
nodes.effect: Overlord's Influence and Overlord's Domain Atlas passives have 45% chance to add twice as much content

strategy_mapping.focus: Doryani Refined Formula or Hilda Scarred Lands; Jado Eastern Knowledge for Verisium Remnants
strategy_mapping.why: Controls explosives, adds Expedition density, improves Verisium outcome
No direct Ritual Master node verified in Phase 2

strategy_mapping.focus: Jado general unique/extra content or Doryani high-mod scaling
strategy_mapping.why: No direct Breach Master node verified in Phase 2
No direct Delirium Master node verified in Phase 2
0.5.4 fixed Atlas passives applying in Abyssal Depths

strategy_mapping.focus: Hilda Mighty Prey/Patient Battue/Gutting and Skinning; Jado In The Wrong Hands; Doryani Head of the Snake
Jado Partial Translations or Hilda Ancient Inscriptions; Doryani map/Waystone scaling
